\tzpentry{ID4398}{Free Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4398 introduces Free Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Hhat_{e,\sigma}^{\mathrm{free}} = -t_e \sum_{n} \bigl( c_{n+1,\sigma}^\dagger c_{n,\sigma} + \mathrm{h.c.} \bigr), \]
